statusChanges.source: No change required — confirmed playing regularly; status validated by 1,048 Liga Portugal minutes and 7 UCL appearances as of Mar 17, 2026.

FotMob / Wiwsport / FC Lorient. Faye returned to collective training Dec 29, 2025, and has accumulated 574 Ligue 1 minutes across 7 appearances in 2025/26 season. No longer sidelined; actively in squad rotation as of Mar 1, 2026.
